sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "seasons" ("year" INTEGER NOT NULL, "label" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "start_date" TEXT NULL, "end_date" TEXT NULL, "round_count" INTEGER NULL, "current_round" INTEGER NULL, "is_current" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_current" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("year"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "circuits" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "locality" TEXT NULL, "country" TEXT NULL, "country_code" TEXT NULL, "latitude" REAL NULL, "longitude" REAL NULL, "length_meters" INTEGER NULL, "corner_count" INTEGER NULL, "direction" TEXT NULL, "first_grand_prix_year" INTEGER NULL, "lap_record_driver_id" TEXT NULL, "lap_record_time_millis" INTEGER NULL, "lap_record_year" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "grand_prix" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "season" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES seasons (year) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "round" INTEGER NOT NULL, "event_slug" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "official_name" TEXT NULL, "circuit_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES circuits (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "format" TEXT NOT NULL, "start_date" TEXT NULL, "end_date" TEXT NULL, "timezone" TEXT NULL, "has_results" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("has_results" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("season", "round"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sessions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "grand_prix_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES grand_prix (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NULL, "start_time_utc" TEXT NULL, "end_time_utc" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "snapshots" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "generated_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_updated_at" TEXT NULL, "stale_after" TEXT NULL, "content_version" TEXT NULL, "server_stale" INTEGER NULL CHECK ("server_stale" IN (0, 1)), "focus_season" INTEGER NULL, "focus_round" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("key"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "drivers" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "full_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "given_name" TEXT NULL, "family_name" TEXT NULL, "short_code" TEXT NULL, "permanent_number" INTEGER NULL, "nationality" TEXT NULL, "country_code" TEXT NULL, "date_of_birth" TEXT NULL, "place_of_birth" TEXT NULL, "biography" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "constructors" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "short_name" TEXT NULL, "nationality" TEXT NULL, "country_code" TEXT NULL, "color_primary" TEXT NULL, "biography" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "driver_season_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "season" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("season" BETWEEN 1950 AND 2100) REFERENCES seasons (year) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "driver_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES drivers (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "constructor_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES constructors (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "race_number" INTEGER NULL, "role" TEXT NULL, "short_code" TEXT NULL, "start_round" INTEGER NULL CHECK("start_round" BETWEEN 1 AND 30), "end_round" INTEGER NULL CHECK("end_round" BETWEEN 1 AND 30), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "constructor_season_entries" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "season" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("season" BETWEEN 1950 AND 2100) REFERENCES seasons (year) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "constructor_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES constructors (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "full_name" TEXT NULL, "short_name" TEXT NULL, "color_primary" TEXT NULL, "color_secondary" TEXT NULL, "power_unit" TEXT NULL, "team_principal" TEXT NULL, "base" TEXT NULL, "chassis" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("season", "constructor_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "driver_standings" ("season" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES seasons (year) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "driver_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES drivers (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "constructor_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES constructors (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "position" INTEGER NULL, "points" REAL NOT NULL, "wins" INTEGER NULL, "podiums" INTEGER NULL, "provisional" INTEGER NULL CHECK ("provisional" IN (0, 1)), "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("order_index" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("season", "driver_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "constructor_standings" ("season" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES seasons (year) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "constructor_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES constructors (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "position" INTEGER NULL, "points" REAL NOT NULL, "wins" INTEGER NULL, "provisional" INTEGER NULL CHECK ("provisional" IN (0, 1)), "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("order_index" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("season", "constructor_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "race_results" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "season" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("season" BETWEEN 1950 AND 2100), "round" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("round" BETWEEN 1 AND 30), "grand_prix_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES grand_prix (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "session_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "fastest_lap_driver_id" TEXT NULL, "fastest_lap_time_millis" INTEGER NULL CHECK("fastest_lap_time_millis" >= 0), "fastest_lap_lap" INTEGER NULL CHECK("fastest_lap_lap" >= 1), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("grand_prix_id", "session_type"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "race_result_entries" ("race_result_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES race_results (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "driver_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES drivers (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "constructor_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES constructors (id) ON DELETE NO ACTION, "position" INTEGER NULL CHECK("position" >= 1), "grid_position" INTEGER NULL CHECK("grid_position" >= 0), "points" REAL NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "laps" INTEGER NULL CHECK("laps" >= 0), "elapsed_time_millis" INTEGER NULL CHECK("elapsed_time_millis" >= 0), "gap_to_leader_millis" INTEGER NULL CHECK("gap_to_leader_millis" >= 0), "laps_behind" INTEGER NULL CHECK("laps_behind" >= 0), "fastest_lap" INTEGER NULL CHECK ("fastest_lap" IN (0, 1)), "dnf_reason" TEXT NULL, "gap_text" TEXT NULL, "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("order_index" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("race_result_id", "driver_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "media_assets" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NULL, "category" TEXT NOT NULL, "format" TEXT NOT NULL, "aspect_ratio" REAL NULL CHECK("aspect_ratio" > 0.0), "version" TEXT NOT NULL, "attribution" TEXT NULL, "license" TEXT NULL, "fallback_category" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "media_variants" ("media_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES media_assets (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "variant_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "url" TEXT NOT NULL, "width" INTEGER NULL CHECK("width" > 0), "height" INTEGER NULL CHECK("height" > 0), PRIMARY KEY ("media_id", "variant_name"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "driver_media" ("media_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES media_assets (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "driver_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES drivers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("order_index" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "constructor_media" ("media_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES media_assets (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "constructor_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES constructors (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("order_index" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "circuit_media" ("media_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES media_assets (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "circuit_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES circuits (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("order_index" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "grand_prix_media" ("media_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES media_assets (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "grand_prix_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES grand_prix (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("order_index" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "resource_sync_metadata" ("resource_key" TEXT NOT NULL, "season" INTEGER NULL, "entity_id" TEXT NULL, "round" INTEGER NULL, "etag" TEXT NULL, "generated_at" TEXT NULL, "source_updated_at" TEXT NULL, "stale_after" TEXT NULL, "content_version" TEXT NULL, "last_attempt_at" TEXT NULL, "last_success_at" TEXT NULL, "last_failure_category" TEXT NULL, "server_stale" INTEGER NULL CHECK ("server_stale" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("resource_key"));
CREATE INDEX idx_grand_prix_season_start ON grand_prix (season, start_date)
CREATE INDEX idx_grand_prix_circuit_season ON grand_prix (circuit_id, season)
CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_gp_order ON sessions (grand_prix_id, order_index)
CREATE INDEX idx_dse_season_driver ON driver_season_entries (season, driver_id, start_round, end_round)
CREATE INDEX idx_dse_season_constructor ON driver_season_entries (season, constructor_id, start_round, end_round)
CREATE INDEX idx_driver_standings_season_order ON driver_standings (season, order_index)
CREATE INDEX idx_constructor_standings_season_order ON constructor_standings (season, order_index)
CREATE INDEX idx_rre_result_order ON race_result_entries (race_result_id, order_index)
CREATE INDEX idx_driver_media_driver ON driver_media (driver_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_constructor_media_constructor ON constructor_media (constructor_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_circuit_media_circuit ON circuit_media (circuit_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_grand_prix_media_gp ON grand_prix_media (grand_prix_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_resource_sync_stale_after ON resource_sync_metadata (stale_after)
CREATE INDEX idx_resource_sync_season_stale ON resource_sync_metadata (season, stale_after)
